title: Acidosasa heterolodicula
taxonomy: Acidosasa heterolodicula is classified under the family Poaceae. This family consists of various types of grasses and is one of the largest and most widespread plant families. Within Poaceae, Acidosasa heterolodicula is further classified as a member of the subfamily Bambusoideae. Bambusoideae is a subfamily of bamboo plants, which are known for their unique hollow stems and woody texture. Acidosasa heterolodicula is specifically classified as a genus of bamboo in the subfamily Bambusoideae.
